title: alyssum montanum var. patulum
intro: Alyssum montanum var. patulum, also known as sweet alison or white alyssum, is a flowering plant species belonging to the mustard family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of alyssum montanum var. patulum include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as a natural remedy for skin irritations and wounds. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in aromatherapy to promote relaxation and reduce stress.
